function.name: workspace_set
function.description: Store a fact in the shared Meridian workspace so other agents (Scout, Argus, Helm, Verity, Sage, Atlas) can read it. Use to publish deploy reasoning, post-deploy concerns, post-mortem outcomes, smart-wallets to watch. Always namespace keys with a prefix: 'deploy:<position_address>', 'watch:<pool_address>', 'postmortem:<position_address>', 'lesson:<topic>'. Overwrites existing key. Pass ttl_seconds to auto-expire (e.g. 604800 for 7 days).

key.description: Namespaced key, e.g. 'deploy:3PtFskEjwVt'. Use ':' to separate scope from id.

value.description: Value. For structured data, pass a JSON-stringified object.

category.description: Optional category tag for filtering, e.g. 'deploy_context', 'watchlist', 'post_mortem', 'lesson'.

ttl_seconds.description: Optional TTL in seconds. Defaults to no expiry. Use 604800 for 7 days, 86400 for 1 day.

function.name: workspace_get
function.description: Read a single fact by exact key from the shared Meridian workspace. Returns null if missing or expired. Use 'deploy:<position_address>' to fetch the deploy context for a specific position you are managing.

function.name: workspace_list
function.description: List facts from the shared Meridian workspace, optionally filtered by category or key prefix. Use to scan all open deploy contexts ('deploy:*'), all pools on watchlist, or all recent post-mortems. Returns up to 50 entries by default, newest first.

function.name: workspace_delete
function.description: Remove a fact from the shared workspace. Use to clear a deploy_context after the position closes, or to retract a stale watch entry. Returns whether anything was deleted.
